parts.text: Create a hero illustration for the webpage 'Home|Sasha Apartsin' (about/index.html). Concept: professional journey, context, and cross-domain experience. Composition: widescreen banner aspect, calm but modern, suitable as page header visual. Style: professional editorial illustration, clean composition, subtle depth, warm-neutral palette (#f6f3ec, #9c5a2e, #2f6f9c), high clarity, no logos, no watermark, no readable text.
